title: Spicy Kale Chaat
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian-inspired snack made with crispy kale and a blend of spices.
instructions: 1. Rinse 2 cups of kale leaves and pat them dry with a paper towel.
2. Heat 1 tsp of garam masala and 1 tsp of chaat masala in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the kale leaves to the pan and toss them with the spice mixture.
4. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the kale is crispy and slightly browned.
5. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
